title: Mynock-class assault boat

The '''''Mynock''-class assault boat''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] in-[[Star system/Legends|system]] combat [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], developed during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Characteristics==
It was said to have been designed as a new generation of [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]], carrying more firepower and troops than earlier designs like the [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1]], but although equipped with its own [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], it was notably slower and less maneuverable, and significantly smaller than the 100-meter minimum that had formerly defined system patrol craft. In effect, it was a robust troop carrier that could be deployed in customs operations against pirates and smugglers, rather than a conventional patrol craft with expanded troop capacity.

The assault boat measured 44 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, with two internal decks, and it was relatively heavily armed for its size, with a turret-mounted [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannon]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] tube, two medium [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and a pair of light chin guns. It was also well armored and shielded, and it had a class 2 hyperdrive, although sublight speed and maneuverability were limited.

The ''Mynock''-class assault boat was crewed by a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], a co-pilot, and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], and could carry up to 24 troops. Its main role in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] was as a boarding craft, but its primary mission was ground assault, where its heavy weaponry could provide effective fire support for the infantry it carried. A single assault boat and its compliment of troopers was considered capable of dealing with most small surface targets.

==Appearances==
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} {{ID|Assault boat}}
